page: cadence-rollup (multi-source: docs site, GitHub commits, daily_review.json, status_history.json)
description: Cadence rollup, 12.0h since prior 2026-05-04T11:06Z poll. NET QUIET on dome public surface — ALL 6 covered page hashes BYTE-IDENTICAL to prior poll AND to all polls back through 2026-04-19 (29th consecutive byte-identical predictions.html / ~14.96d): home cb47aab7d62a8380d7f15c35afc0d4db (64,441), wins 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0 (91,686), predictions 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785 (152,936), coordinates 5127700325dc0b2bf69a0eea7a94df06 (14,061), model 28cef1a65d65bf6a0a3b0f77458d203d (58,429), evolution 93f99dd70d6d52fbb5616cbc5fec5aa5 (9,638). 10 commits since prior poll (ALL auto: 8 Auto-update ECM status + 2 ECM data pull). 0 manual commits. 0 HOLD-fires this window (HOLD #14 ETA ~2026-05-05T07:30Z, ~8.5h after this poll). 31st consecutive auto-only poll (was 30). Manual-commit drought now 17.46d / 419.06h (16d threshold crossed at prior poll, 17d threshold crossed at 2026-05-04T12:02:38Z ~11h ago). Source-file SHAs unchanged (monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe, scripts/build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, inject_ai_layer.py 58996a0c, verify_predictions.py db947cab, generate_manifest.js 786842ed). docs/ai_manifest.json byte-identical 405d5c9371aa8ad32f040528e1731eb1/14880 V51.1 last_updated=2026-04-17 (git SHA ea66371b); docs/api/index.json byte-identical e00e85aa8907af40778096f9a138c2d6/4056 last_updated=2026-04-17 (git SHA 890fb607). Live status_history.json 561 entries via /predictions/data/status_history.json (was 553 prior poll; +8 from 8 Auto-update appends — exact match); latest entry 2026-05-04T22:39:40Z, ECLIPSE_DAYS=99 (UNCHANGED across full poll window — both prior 11:06Z and current 23:06Z polls are within May 4 UTC; the daily eclipse_days decrement happens at midnight UTC, so 99->98 is expected at 2026-05-05T00:00Z next ~1h after this poll. Cross-check against status_history.json confirms eclipse_days holds exactly one value per UTC day for the trailing 25 UTC days inspected — established cadence is 1/day decrement at midnight UTC, no within-day variation), wins_confirmed=67 (67-vs-69 mismatch unchanged), version V51.0 (auto-pipeline internal counter unchanged). Title still verbatim 'Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model V51.1 — 69 Confirmed Registry Items'; confirmed=69, accuracy=94.5%, V51.1 unchanged in title/manifest; refined=4. Parameters baseline-clean (byte-identical model.html confirms 20,015 / 8,537 / 5,733 / 2,534 unchanged; refraction coefficient unchanged). Repo description still null. Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (fd9d0a8d, 411ec05e, 5b9478e4, 3d3df225); no new prediction-isolation file; weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json STILL no .ots companion (~7+ weeks). NOTABLE INFRASTRUCTURE OBSERVATION: GitHub Pages now returns 404 for the legacy root path /predictions/status_history.json (Fastly age=205s on the 404 response, x-cache HIT/x-cache-hits 1; first fetch this poll caught a stale 200 with 519 entries from the prior cache state). Canonical path /predictions/data/status_history.json continues to serve fresh 561-entry content. Repo has the file at BOTH paths with identical SHA 0ed8522d/13,079,599. This is a CDN/Pages cache eviction, NOT a dome-author content move (both repo paths unchanged); no action required, but worth documenting because the 519-entry cached response could have led a poller-replay to false-conclude content shrinkage. STEP 10b SILENT-IGNORE WATCH (9 PREDs in window): PRED-105 d=16.96 past 2026-04-18 close — verdict tacit_withdrawal locked; dome side: 29th consecutive byte-identical pred-105 entry on predictions.html (still PENDING/PROSPECTIVE label, no acknowledgment ~17d post-close). PRED-077, -081, -085, -087, -088, -090, -106, -111 all at d=4.96 past close; predictions.html byte-identical confirms ZERO post-closure adjudication across all 7 polls / ~119h post-close; no commit messages reference any PRED-NNN identifier; SEVERITY MEDIUM per Step 10b day-4-7 rule. Per Step 10b 'no new dedicated chg-* needed — prior dedicated (chg-20260504-1106-002) stands until band transition or adjudication signal'; this poll does NOT write a new dedicated chg-* for the lapse. Next band transition (day-8+ HIGH) at 2026-05-08T00:00Z (~3.04d from now). Content-security sweep clean (0 prompt-injection phrases on any of 6 pages, 0 hidden-CSS anomalies). Author-contact prior NOT invoked — zero published-surface change to attribute.

eclipse_days_observation: ECLIPSE_DAYS=99 across the full 12h poll window. Cross-checked against status_history.json eclipse_days trajectory (last 25 UTC days, 2026-04-10 through 2026-05-04): cadence is exactly 1-decrement-per-UTC-day, no within-day variation. Prior poll's 100->99 flip occurred at 2026-05-04T00:00Z midnight UTC. This poll is at 23:06Z May 4 UTC — still within the 99 day; the next 99->98 flip is expected at 2026-05-05T00:00Z (~54 min after this poll write). No anomaly: 99 holding across this 12h poll window is the EXPECTED behavior, not a stall.
manual_approval_gate_hypothesis: UNCHANGED from prior poll — 0 HOLDs fired this window so no new gate-vs-release evidence. Next test point is HOLD #14 at ~2026-05-05T07:30Z. The 4-event streak from prior poll still stands.
infrastructure_path_observation: GitHub Pages root path /predictions/status_history.json returns 404 (was serving stale cached 200 with 519 entries earlier this poll, now Fastly-cached 404 with age=205s). Canonical /predictions/data/status_history.json is fresh and correct. Repo has both paths with identical content (SHA 0ed8522d). Likely Pages cache eviction, not a dome-author action. Documented to prevent confusion if a future poll catches a similar stale-cache moment.
